Container.Name: Atrium
Container.Overview:
Atrium is a self-hosted client portal for agencies and freelancers. Share project progress, files, and updates with your clients through a beautiful branded portal.
Features: - Project management with status tracking - File sharing with S3/MinIO/R2 or local storage - Branded client portal - Email notifications via Resend - Multi-user with role-based access
REQUIRES a PostgreSQL 16 database. Install the official PostgreSQL container first or point DATABASE_URL to an existing Postgres instance.
Container.Requires: PostgreSQL 16 database (install the official postgres container or use an external database)
Container.Description: Atrium is a self-hosted client portal for agencies and freelancers. Share project progress, files, and updates with your clients through a beautiful branded portal.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Atrium web interface

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. If using the Atrium-DB companion container, use: postgresql://atrium:atrium@AtriumDB:5432/atrium

Config.Name: Auth Secret
Config.Description: Random string (min 32 characters) used to sign auth tokens. Generate one at: https://generate-secret.vercel.app/32

Config.Name: Storage Provider
Config.Description: Storage backend: local, s3, minio, or r2

Config.Name: S3 Endpoint
Config.Description: S3-compatible endpoint URL (for MinIO, R2, etc.)

Config.Name: Resend API Key
Config.Description: Resend API key for sending emails (optional)

Config.Name: Max File Size (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum file upload size in megabytes

Config.Name: Skip DB Push
Config.Description: Set to true to skip automatic database schema sync on startup (for pooled connections)
